assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Response includes --maintenance-window-recurrence "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA" which configures weekly Saturday maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Response provides gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start "2024-01-06T02:00:00Z", --maintenance-window-duration 4h, and --maintenance-window-recurrence "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA"

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud commands for Q1, Q2, Q3, and Q4 code freeze exclusions, each spanning 30 days with exact start and end dates

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Response includes Q4 code freeze exclusion that covers November 1-30, 2024, specifically mentioning it includes the audit period

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not explain the distinction between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends Extended channel and explains how it provides maximum upgrade control for regulated environments

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time flags for each quarterly exclusion

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
